rulings.Case Title: THE CAITLIN ROTH SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST, DATED OCTOBER 7, 1997 AS AMENDED AND RESTATED BY SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #13, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/15/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The order dated 12/2/20 indicated that there were 1,913.529 shares of AAM/Bahl & Gaynor Income Growth Fund, but this accounting begins with 1906.747 shares. Furthermore, the assets on hand as of 6/30/22 show 1913.53 shares on hand, but the financial statement shows 1,874.586 shares initially purchased on 6/13/15, 19.882 shares reinvested in prior periods, and 6.217 shares reinvested most recently. The financial statement also shows 1,178.574 shares of Thornburg Inv Inc Builder, but the accounting shows 1180.52 shares. It appears that the trustee was asked for more information about the trust beneficiary in the prior accounting, but this report again does not provide any information about the beneficiary or her current circumstances or how the SNT is being used for her benefit. Who are "Josephine" mentioned in the attorney time entry for 12/10/20 in the context of purchasing a bond and Stewart Goldberg mentioned in the time entry for 7/27/22 regarding issues with schedules. Were those for this case? (To which date is "that time" referring in section 2 in the report? There are several dates preceding that final sentence.) Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/4/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VIRGINIA RAMOS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/11/2022 for same issues. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Liabilities need to be on a separate schedule in accordance with Probate Code 1063(g) not as part of the assets on hand at the beginning of the account. (See page 2 account in Supplement). A "revised account" must be filed as an amendment or amended petition and re-noticed. (CRC 7.3, 7.53). 2) Revised entries on disbursements must be filed as an amendment or amended petition and re-noticed. (CRC 7.3, 7.53). An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 9/26/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE R. GENE GEISLER TRUST DATED SEPTEMBER 28, 1992, AS AMENDED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Verified Probate 850 Petition, For Order Confirming Trust Ownership Of And Conveyance Of Title To Bank Accounts
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Proper notice to Larry Mesple, Forest Cassidy, and Bruce Gullett has not been provided. a. Proofs of Service filed on 6/28/22 indicate that Larry Mesple and Forest Cassidy were served on 6/17/22 for the 6/28/22 hearing, which was only an 11-day notice (30-day notice is required for trust petitions). Furthermore, the Notice of Hearing that was served was not attached and it is unclear whether the correct hearing information was given. b. Bruce Gullett still has not been given notice. 2) Proper notice to Leo Michael Yost has not been provided. a. Proof of Service filed on 6/28/22 indicates that service was made on 6/17/22 for the 6/28/22 hearing. The Notice of Hearing served was also not attached to the proof of service. 3) Personal service to the intestate heirs has not been provided. a. Proofs of Service filed on 6/28/22 indicates that Kimberly Geisler and Sara Blake were served on 6/19/22 and 6/22/22, respectively, for the 6/28/22 hearing. The Notice of Hearing served was also not attached to the proof of service. b. Many intestate heirs were identified in the supplemental declaration filed on 6/27/22, the majority of whom (other than Kimberly Geisler and Sara Blake, who were given inadequate service) were not given personal service. 4) Contents of the safe deposit box has not been described sufficiently. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RUBY MAE HOWARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/8/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: No response yet (as of 9/6/22) to the many issues posted for the 7/27/22 hearing. Furthermore, the proof of publication filed on 7/13/22 does not indicate that the petitioner, Debra L. McKee, seeks to have a will admitted. A supplement to the petition, prepared on pleading paper and signed and verified by the proposed executor, must be filed to address the inconsistencies in the petition and provide the missing information (parties named in the will, including their relationship to the decedent and address). Notice must be published again, showing that the petitioner seeks to admit a will. A courtesy copy of the supplement, the Receipt of Acknowledgment of the Duties and Liabilities, the Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number, and the proof of service of notice mailed to all parties by a disinterested party, and a proposed order must be received by the assigned examiner by no later than 10/31/22 to avoid another continuance. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: TRANSFERRED TO MADERA COUNTY** IN THE MATTER OF THE PATRICIA MOFFAT POPE LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Authorizing Trustee To Take Actions As Noticed And As Modified
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/15/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: Paragraph 1 of the petition appears to be inaccurate. The trustee resides in Madera County. All petitions involving a trust must state the names and last known addresses of all vested or contingent beneficiaries. [CRC 7.902.] Unless the person entitled to notice is an adult and has directed the party giving notice in writing to send the notice in care of the second person, notice must be given directly to the person entitled to notice. [CRC 7.51.] If a notice or other paper is required or permitted to be served or delivered pursuant to Section 1215 to a person who is represented by an attorney of record, the notice or other paper shall also be delivered pursuant to Section 1215 to this attorney, but not ONLY to the attorney, unless so directed in writing. [Probate Code Section 1214.] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 11/4/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
